steps.title: Match the historical time frame
steps.content: The sentence is about a completed period from 1912 to 1951. The verbs owned, operated, and was are past tense, so the blank needs a finite past-tense verb.

steps.title: Choose the past-tense verb
steps.content: Choice A is future tense. Choice C is present progressive. Choice D is an infinitive, not the main verb needed for the clause. The simple past-tense verb fits the completed historical period. The answer is B.
